creator: roam@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: analyzed->closed

Committed with some cleanup, thanks! 

Next time, please submit a patch against the existing port instead of 
a whole new sharball.  Also, try to use an editor and a mailer that do not 
convert spaces to tabs - this corrupts both Makefiles and patches and 
makes updating the port rather tedious hand-editing work.
